evals.prompt: Add real-time collaborative editing to my Next.js app at /Users/yoenzhang/Downloads/velt-test-demo-scaffolding using TipTap and Yjs. The document pages at /dashboard/[docId] should have a TipTap editor where multiple users can edit simultaneously with cursor awareness. Use y-websocket for sync.
evals.expected_output: Y.Doc singleton, y-prosemirror or Collaboration extension, WebsocketProvider, awareness for cursors, history disabled, cleanup on unmount.

evals.prompt: Set up Yjs document synchronization for my Next.js app at /Users/yoenzhang/Downloads/velt-test-demo-scaffolding. I need WebSocket-based real-time sync between users plus IndexedDB persistence so edits work offline. Documents at /dashboard/[docId] should each have their own Yjs room.
evals.expected_output: WebsocketProvider + IndexeddbPersistence both connected to same Y.Doc, room scoped to docId, proper cleanup.

evals.prompt: Build a collaborative task list for my Next.js app at /Users/yoenzhang/Downloads/velt-test-demo-scaffolding using Yjs shared types. On /dashboard/[docId], users should see a task list where anyone can add, edit, toggle, and delete tasks in real-time. Use Y.Array for the list and sync via y-websocket.
evals.expected_output: Y.Array for tasks, transact() for mutations, observe() for remote changes, WebsocketProvider, cleanup.
